toast.stop_all_background_jobs: Stopping all background jobs (analysis, dup scan, PDF scan, PDF metadata, fingerprints, KVR update check)...
toast.tag_bar_hidden_filter: Bilah tag disembunyikan (filter masih aktif). Tampilkan melalui Pengaturan.

toast.thread_multiplier_set: Pengganda thread disetel ke {val}x — mulai ulang untuk menerapkan
ui.ae.add_insert_slot_tt: Add another insert row (fuzzy search from the plugin scan).
ui.ae.apply_device_tt: Apply the selected output device, buffer, playback settings, and inserts to the audio engine.
ui.ae.apply_inserts_tt: Load the selected plug-ins for library playback. Stop the output stream first.
ui.ae.audio_device_type_tt: JUCE audio device type (CoreAudio, ASIO, JACK, etc.). Changing driver stops active streams and refreshes device lists.
ui.ae.buffer_frames_input_tt: Optional fixed buffer for start_input_stream. The list comes from the selected input device’s supported sizes (get_input_device_info.buffer_sizes). Choose Driver default to omit buffer_frames.
ui.ae.buffer_frames_output_tt: Optional fixed buffer for start_output_stream. The list comes from the selected output device’s supported sizes (get_output_device_info.buffer_sizes). Choose Driver default to omit buffer_frames.
ui.ae.err_no_ipc: Audio engine IPC unavailable (not running in the app shell).
ui.ae.graphs_desc: Scope-derived diagnostics for the engine output (distinct from the Visualizer tab): Mid/Side traces, L-R difference waveform, stereo energy envelope, vectorscope (L vs R), DC offset (mean), magnitude histogram, peak sample trace max(|L|,|R|), left–right RMS balance, Pearson correlation toward mono, stereo width (side / mid), and crest factor (peak / RMS). For FFT, oscilloscope, spectrogram, stereo field, levels, and octave bands, open the Visualizer tab.
ui.ae.heading: Audio Engine
ui.ae.input_device_tt: Choose which input is used for the caps readout and for Start input capture. Live capture status and peak update in the engine status card.
ui.ae.input_devices_intro: Choose an input, view driver caps, and start or stop capture. The list comes from list_input_devices; live capture status and peak update in the engine status card.
ui.ae.insert_editor_tt: Open the native plug-in window for this insert slot. Apply inserts first.
ui.ae.insert_hide_audio_units_tt: Jendela editor plugin AU kosong dalam build ini karena audiocomponentd menolak pengiriman tampilan AU di luar proses ke host yang ditandatangani ad-hoc. Sembunyikan AU dari pemilih insert (default) hingga proyek ditandatangani dengan Developer ID yang benar. Matikan jika Anda hanya memerlukan pemrosesan audio AU tanpa membuka editor.
ui.ae.insert_show_instruments_tt: When off, the insert picker lists only plug-ins JUCE marks as effects (not synths or samplers). Turn on to include instruments.
ui.ae.insert_slot_tt: Optional VST3 or AU effect (from scan). Order is serial: slot 1 → slot 4.
ui.ae.intro: Low-latency JUCE AudioEngine: pick driver (device type), optional sample rate, then output device — Apply opens an output stream (silence or optional 440 Hz test tone on F32 devices). Input section can start a capture stream (samples discarded until metering/DSP). engine_state returns output `stream` and `input_stream`. Optional buffer_frames applies to both directions. Playback output & EQ mirror the floating player; VST3/AU inserts run after the built-in EQ when you Apply inserts (stop the output stream first).
ui.ae.output_device_tt: System output device for the audio engine
ui.ae.playback_dsp_intro: Same settings as the floating player (saved in preferences). Applies to library playback through the AudioEngine when a track is playing.
ui.ae.playback_spectrum_bands_tt: Number of FFT magnitude bins sent in playback_status (caps at Nyquist for the FFT size).
ui.ae.playback_spectrum_cap_hint: At most {max} bands for this FFT size (Nyquist = half the window in points).
ui.ae.playback_spectrum_points_tt: FFT window size (points) for the library playback spectrum / visualizer. Larger sizes cost more CPU; Off sends no FFT in the engine.
ui.ae.playback_spectrum_quality_tt: FFT size and bin count for playback_status when library playback runs through the AudioEngine. Lower presets reduce host CPU; Off skips FFT work (visualizer / EQ spectrum fall back to Web Audio or idle).
ui.ae.playback_spectrum_row_tt: FFT window length and how many bands are sent in playback_status. Larger windows cost more CPU; fewer bands reduce IPC payload. Off skips FFT in the engine.
ui.ae.playback_transport_intro: Rodio transport: play/pause, seek ±5s, reverse (same behavior as the floating player).
ui.ae.playback_volume_tt: Output level for AudioEngine library playback (0–100%).
ui.ae.plugin_scan_cache_desc: Per-module timeout for the JUCE scan subprocess. Wipe deletes cache files and starts a full rescan.
ui.ae.plugin_scan_timeout_tt: Seconds per plug-in module before the scan worker kills the child process (5–3600). Saved in preferences as pluginScanTimeoutSec.
ui.ae.plugins_insert_intro: Pick up to four effects from the scanned plug-in list. Stop output stream, Apply inserts, then play from the library.
ui.ae.plugins_scan_stuck_hint: — Stalled: JUCE may be hung inside this plug-in (not the same as a crash). Restart Audio Engine AudioEngine if this never advances.
ui.ae.plugins_scanning_note: Scanning VST3/AU plug-ins in the background (bad modules are skipped).
ui.ae.plugins_stub: Phase: {phase}. Planned formats: {formats}. Active insert slots: {count}. {note}
ui.ae.process_stats_not_running: Subproses AudioEngine belum berjalan (dibuat pada IPC pertama).
ui.ae.refresh_devices_tt: Reload the system audio device list from the engine.
ui.ae.restart_audioengine_tt: Kill the audio-engine process and spawn a fresh one if it crashed or stopped responding. AudioEngine stream and playback state is reset.
ui.ae.sample_rate_tt: Optional fixed sample rate for start_output_stream and start_input_stream. Options come from the selected output device; leave as driver default if unsure.
ui.ae.start_input_capture_tt: Open cpal input stream (samples discarded until metering/DSP)
ui.ae.status_applied_stream: Device {id} saved; silence output stream running.
ui.ae.status_row_desc: Versi AudioEngine, stream, pengambilan input, serta CPU/memori/thread/FD subproses (hanya baca; pengukuran sama dengan header aplikasi).
ui.ae.status_stub: Not connected — engine process not implemented yet.
ui.ae.stop_stream_tt: Stop the cpal output stream (silence placeholder)
ui.ae.test_tone_tt: Low-level sine on F32 default stream; toggle live if supported
ui.ae.transport_reverse_tt: Reverse playback — full decode in AudioEngine RAM when enabled (same as floating player)
ui.ae.transport_section_desc: Play/pause, seek ±5s, reverse — same as the floating player.
ui.ae.wipe_rescan_plugins_tt: Delete known-plugin-list.xml and related cache files, then run a full VST3/AU scan (uses the timeout above).
ui.audio.load_more_hint: Menampilkan {shown} dari {total} — klik untuk memuat lebih banyak
ui.audio.meta_spectrogram_canvas_tt: Spectrogram — low frequencies at bottom, high at top
ui.audio.meta_tt_key: Musical key detected via chromagram analysis
ui.audio.not_playable_in_audio_engine: {ext} is not playable in audio engine
ui.audio.similar_empty: Tidak ada sampel serupa yang ditemukan. Pindai lebih banyak sampel terlebih dahulu.
ui.audio.similar_fp_detail: {cached} already cached for this search — {uncached} to compute. First run is slow; subsequent searches are fast.
ui.audio.similar_fp_status: Computing fingerprints for {uncached} of {total} library samples...
ui.audio.tt_cell_bpm_exhausted: Tempo could not be estimated; background analysis will not retry until the BPM cache is cleared.
ui.audio.tt_sort_modified: Tanggal terakhir diubah — klik untuk mengurutkan
ui.daw.no_filter_matches: Tidak ada proyek DAW yang cocok dengan filter saat ini.
ui.dep_graph.analytics_empty: No data to analyze. Build the plugin index first.
ui.dep_graph.confirm_build_index_body: No plugin index data. You must run "Plugin Index" first to scan DAW projects for plugin references. Build the index now?
ui.dep_graph.empty_all_referenced: All installed plugins are referenced in scanned projects.
ui.dep_graph.empty_no_plugins_in_project: No plugins found in this project
ui.dep_graph.title: Plugin Dependency Graph
ui.dep_graph.tt_tab_most_used: Plugins ranked by how many projects use them
ui.dep_graph.tt_tab_orphaned: Installed plugins not used in any scanned project
ui.dup.content_cancelled_note: Partial results ({done} / {total} same-size paths hashed — more duplicates may exist if you run the full scan).
ui.dup.content_cancelled_progress: Progress when stopped: {done} / {total} same-size paths hashed.
ui.dup.content_empty: Tidak ada file identik per byte. File dengan ukuran unik dilewati tanpa dibaca.
ui.dup.content_hint: Mengelompokkan path menurut ukuran tersimpan, lalu SHA-256. Byte yang sama tetap dihitung meski nama atau folder berbeda. Pustaka besar bisa memakan waktu.
ui.dup.name_empty: Tidak ada duplikat berdasarkan nama. Salinan plugin berbagi nama yang sama; sampel/DAW/preset cocok pada nama dan format.
ui.export.csv_header_midi: Nama, Trek, BPM, TimeSig, Kunci, Catatan, Saluran, Durasi, Ukuran, Jalur
ui.export.import_empty_audio: File tidak berisi sampel audio atau kosong.
ui.export.import_empty_daw: File tidak berisi proyek DAW atau kosong.
ui.export.import_empty_pdfs: File tidak berisi PDF atau kosong.
ui.export.import_empty_plugins: File tidak mengandung plugin atau kosong.
ui.export.import_empty_presets: File tidak berisi preset atau kosong.
ui.export.import_empty_videos: File contains no videos or is empty.
ui.folder_watch_no_scan_dirs: No directories to watch yet. Add paths under Folder watch directories, or leave that list empty and set scan directories above.
ui.fzf.boundary.desc: Bonus untuk pencocokan pada batas kata
ui.fzf.boundary.label: Bonus Batas Kata

ui.history.select_scan_hint: Pilih pindaian dari sidebar untuk melihat detailnya
ui.hm.card_bpm_canvas_title: Histogram BPM — tunggu proses latar belakang untuk mengisi data
ui.hm.card_bpm_empty: Perluas baris sampel untuk mengisi data BPM
ui.hm.card_key_canvas_title: Distribusi kunci musik — mayor (cyan) vs minor (magenta)
ui.hm.card_key_empty: Perluas baris sampel untuk mengisi data penting
ui.hm.card_timeline_canvas_title: File diubah per bulan selama 24 bulan terakhir
ui.hm.partial_sample_rows: Size / folder / timeline charts use the loaded sample page ({shown} of {total} in the library).

ui.js.no_plugins_found_body: Tidak ada plugin VST2, VST3, atau Audio Unit yang ditemukan di direktori sistem standar.
ui.midi.empty_state: Tidak ada file MIDI yang ditemukan. Jalankan pemindaian preset untuk menemukan file .mid.
ui.opt.name: Nama
ui.p.browse_your_filesystem_configure_ro: Jelajahi sistem file Anda. Konfigurasikan direktori root di Pengaturan > Pemindaian.
ui.p.daw_empty: Klik "Pindai Proyek DAW" untuk menemukan semua file proyek DAW (Ableton, Logic, FL Studio, Cubase, REAPER, dll.) di sistem Anda.
ui.p.favorites_empty: Klik kanan plugin, sampel, proyek DAW, atau preset apa pun dan pilih "Tambahkan ke Favorit".
ui.p.notes_empty: Klik kanan plugin, sampel, proyek DAW, atau preset apa pun dan pilih "Tambahkan Catatan".
ui.p.pdfs_empty: Klik "Pindai PDF" untuk menemukan dokumen PDF di sistem Anda.
ui.p.presets_empty: Klik "Pindai Preset" untuk menemukan preset VST/AU/DAW di sistem Anda.
ui.p.samples_empty: Klik "Pindai Sampel" untuk menemukan semua file audio (WAV, MP3, AIFF, FLAC, dll.) di sistem Anda.
ui.p.select_a_scan_from_the_sidebar_to_v: Pilih pindaian dari sidebar untuk melihat detailnya
ui.p.tags_empty: Klik kanan item mana pun dan pilih "Tambahkan Catatan" untuk menambahkan tag, atau gunakan menu tag cepat.
ui.p.videos_empty: Click "Scan Videos" to find video files on your system.
ui.p.welcome_scan_intro: Klik "Pindai Plugin" atau "Pindai Semua" untuk menemukan semua yang ada di sistem Anda.
ui.perf.line_db_caches: Cache: {kvr} KVR | {waveforms} bentuk gelombang | {spectrograms} spektogram | {xref} xref | {fp} sidik jari
ui.perf.line_db_library: Library (unique paths): {samples} samples | {plugins} plugins | {daw} DAW | {presets} presets | {midi} MIDI | {pdfs} PDFs
ui.perf.line_db_read_pool: SQLite read pool: {total} file handles ({extra} extra) — pref: {pref}
ui.perf.line_db_scans: Pemindaian: plugin {plugin_scans} | {audio_scans} audio | {daw_scans} DAW | {preset_scans} prasetel | {midi_scans} midi | {pdf_scans} pdf
ui.perf.line_db_tables: Table rows (raw): {samples} samples | {plugins} plugins | {daw} DAW | {presets} presets | {midi} midi | {pdfs} pdfs
ui.perf.line_walker_channel: Saluran Walker: buf {buf} | kumpulan {batch} | kedalaman {depth} | siram {flush} ms
ui.perf.xref_format_count: {n} Format DAW dengan referensi silang plugin
ui.scheme.arctic.label: Arktik
ui.scheme.cyberpunk.label: dunia maya
ui.scheme.ember.label: Bara
ui.scheme.matrix.label: Matriks
ui.scheme.midnight.label: Tengah malam
ui.sd.additional_directories_to_scan_for: Additional directories to scan for audio samples (one path per line; press Enter between paths—long paths scroll horizontally)
Additional directories to scan for DAW project files (one path per line; press Enter between paths—long paths scroll horizontally)
Additional directories to scan for MIDI files (one path per line; press Enter between paths—long paths scroll horizontally)
Additional directories to scan for PDF documents (one path per line; press Enter between paths—long paths scroll horizontally)
Additional directories to scan for plugin presets (one path per line; press Enter between paths—long paths scroll horizontally)
Additional directories to scan for plugins (one path per line; press Enter between paths—long paths scroll horizontally)
Additional directories to scan for video files (one per line)
ui.sd.animated_pulsing_neon_borders_on_p: Batas neon berdenyut animasi pada panel, modals, dan ubin
ui.sd.animated_scanline_overlays_and_vig: Hamparan dan sketsa garis pindaian animasi
ui.sd.app_log_verbosity_desc: Normal: scan lifecycle, errors, TCC/readdir failures, incremental warnings. Verbose: SMB dedup/retry/enter traces, MIDI mount/dedup, each live KVR fetch, incremental snapshot key count, entry counts per directory at depth 0–2. Quiet: optional prefix filter on normal lines (none by default).
ui.sd.auto_content_dup_on_startup: When on, start the SHA-256 byte-duplicate scan after the app finishes loading library counts (default off).
ui.sd.auto_fingerprint_cache_on_startup: When on, start fingerprint cache build for the audio library after load (CPU-heavy; default off).
ui.sd.auto_kvr_check_on_startup: When on, run one plugin update check after the app loads the plugin database (separate from “after auto-scan”). Default off.
ui.sd.auto_pdf_metadata_on_startup: When on, start a full background PDF page-count pass once after startup (independent of the PDF tab). Default off.
ui.sd.auto_pdf_scan_on_startup: When on and PDF scan roots are configured, run Scan PDFs once at launch if the indexed PDF count is zero (default off).
ui.sd.automatically_check_for_plugin_upd: Secara otomatis memeriksa pembaruan plugin setelah pemindaian
ui.sd.automatically_play_the_next_sample: Secara otomatis memutar sampel berikutnya ketika sampel saat ini berakhir
ui.sd.automatically_run_bpm_key_lufs_ana: Jalankan analisis latar belakang BPM/Key/LUFS secara otomatis saat aplikasi dimulai
ui.sd.automatically_scan_for_plugins_whe: Pindai plugin secara otomatis saat aplikasi dimulai
ui.sd.autoplay_next_source: When autoplay next is on, advance through the floating player list (loops) or visible Samples rows (loops)
ui.sd.autoplay_the_selected_sample_when_: Autoplay the selected sample when you move the selection with arrow keys or j/k on the Samples tab
ui.sd.batch_analysis_threads: Rayon workers per background analysis batch (1–16). Lower leaves more CPU for playback. Applies on the next batch.
ui.sd.bpm_key_lufs_analysis: Analisis file yang belum memiliki BPM, kunci, dan kenyaringan — tugas latar belakang yang sama dengan analisis idle
ui.sd.clear_saved_table_column_sizes_and: Hapus ukuran kolom tabel yang disimpan dan pulihkan default
ui.sd.click_a_sample_row_to_start_playba: Klik baris sampel untuk memulai pemutaran alih-alih memerlukan klik dua kali
ui.sd.content_dup_hash_threads: Rayon workers for SHA-256 duplicate chunks (1–32). Separate from the global scan pool. Applies on the next scan.
ui.sd.content_dup_scan: Find byte-identical files across the library. Runs in the background; progress appears in the header and Duplicates → By content.
ui.sd.create_your_own_color_scheme_by_pi: Buat skema warna Anda sendiri dengan memilih warna di bawah ini
ui.sd.directory_names_to_skip_during_sca: Nama direktori yang akan dilewati selama pemindaian (satu per baris). Berlaku untuk semua pemindai.
ui.sd.double_click_a_sample_row_to_expan: Klik dua kali baris sampel untuk meluaskan/menciutkan metadata. Pengaturan diubah secara otomatis dengan klik dua kali
ui.sd.folder_watch_directories: Paths to watch (one per line). Leave empty to use plugin scan dirs plus all library scan dirs below. If you add any path here, only this list is watched.
ui.sd.folder_watch_scan_paths_explainer: Paths to watch (one per line). Leave empty to use plugin scan dirs plus all library scan dirs. If you add any path here, only this list is watched.
ui.sd.frame_rate_cap_for_the_visualizer_: Batas kecepatan bingkai untuk tab visualisator (lebih rendah = lebih sedikit CPU)
ui.sd.how_audio_samples_are_ordered_afte: Bagaimana sampel audio diurutkan setelah pemindaian
ui.sd.how_daw_projects_are_ordered_after: Bagaimana proyek DAW diurutkan setelah pemindaian
ui.sd.how_midi_files_are_ordered_after_s: How MIDI files are ordered after scanning
ui.sd.how_pdf_files_are_ordered_after_sc: How PDFs are ordered after scanning
ui.sd.how_presets_are_ordered_after_scan: How presets are ordered after scanning
ui.sd.include_als_files_from_ableton_s_b: Sertakan file .als dari direktori Backup dan Crash Ableton dalam hasil pemindaian DAW
ui.sd.incremental_directory_scan: When on, skip subtrees whose directory mtime is unchanged since the last complete unified scan (faster). Turn off to always walk the full tree.
ui.sd.ipc_buffer_capacity_between_scan_t: Kapasitas buffer IPC antara thread pemindaian dan UI. Lebih tinggi = lebih sedikit pemblokiran. Diperlukan mulai ulang.
ui.sd.items_per_batch_sent_from_scanner_: Item per batch dikirim dari pemindai ke UI. Lebih besar = lebih sedikit panggilan IPC. Diperlukan mulai ulang.
ui.sd.max_cached_waveforms_in_memory_hig: Bentuk gelombang maksimal yang di-cache di memori (lebih tinggi = lebih banyak RAM)
ui.sd.max_open_files_per_process_raise_i: Maksimum membuka file per proses. Naikkan jika pemindaian dibatalkan pada perpustakaan besar atau jaringan berbagi. Diperlukan mulai ulang.
ui.sd.minimum_ms_between_dom_updates_dur: Minimum ms antara pembaruan DOM selama pemindaian (lebih rendah = lebih lancar, lebih tinggi = lebih cepat)
ui.sd.number_of_rows_to_render_per_page_: Jumlah baris yang akan dirender per halaman dalam tabel audio/DAW
ui.sd.number_of_tracks_to_keep_in_the_pl: Jumlah trek yang disimpan dalam riwayat pemutaran
ui.sd.open_the_app_s_preferences_databas: Buka preferensi aplikasi, database, dan direktori log di Finder
ui.sd.open_the_preferences_toml_file_in_: Buka file TOML preferensi di editor default Anda
ui.sd.place_the_tag_filter_bar_above_or_: Tempatkan bilah filter tag di atas atau di bawah tab
ui.sd.plugin_type_to_show_by_default_aft: Jenis plugin yang akan ditampilkan secara default setelah pemindaian
ui.sd.prune_old_scans: On startup (after a delay), remove older completed scan runs except the last N per scanner type. Turn off to keep all history (larger DB). Next launch applies.
ui.sd.prune_old_scans_keep: Number of most recent completed scans retained per type (plugins, samples, DAW, presets, MIDI, PDF) when pruning is on.
ui.sd.remove_all_plugin_audio_and_daw_sc: Hapus semua riwayat pemindaian plugin, audio, dan DAW
ui.sd.remove_cached_version_lookups_next: Hapus pencarian versi cache — pemeriksaan berikutnya akan mengambil ulang semuanya
ui.sd.reset_all_sizing_positioning_order: Atur ulang SEMUA ukuran, posisi, pemesanan, dan tata letak ke default pabrik. Menghapus urutan tab, urutan/lebar kolom, urutan bagian, posisi modal, dok pemutar, urutan bilah stat, urutan bilah alat, urutan kartu dasbor, dan semua preferensi penyusunan ulang seret. Perlu memuat ulang.
ui.sd.restore_default_settings_section_o: Kembalikan urutan bagian pengaturan default (seret judul untuk mengatur ulang)
ui.sd.restore_the_default_tab_order_drag: Kembalikan urutan tab default (seret tab untuk mengatur ulang)
ui.sd.save_all_preferences_and_keyboard_: Simpan semua preferensi dan pintasan keyboard ke file teks
ui.sd.save_the_error_crash_log_file_for_: Simpan file log kesalahan/kerusakan untuk debugging
ui.sd.seconds_of_idle_before_background_: Beberapa detik menganggur sebelum analisis BPM/Kunci/LUFS latar belakang dilanjutkan
ui.sd.show_hide_the_tag_filter_bar_when_: Menampilkan/menyembunyikan bilah filter tag saat tag aktif
ui.sd.show_the_audio_player_when_the_app: Tampilkan pemutar audio saat aplikasi dimulai (mengembalikan status pemutaran terakhir)
ui.sd.snapshot_export_dir: PNG snapshots from the Visualizer tab and Audio Engine graphs. By default they go to the app data folder under snapshots/. Set a path here to override; leave empty to use that default (not the browser download folder).
ui.sd.sqlite_read_pool_extra: Extra read-only database connections for parallel queries (WAL). 0 = automatic (CPU-based, capped). Higher uses more RAM. Restart required.
ui.sd.switch_between_dark_cyberpunk_and_: Beralih antara mode cyberpunk gelap dan mode cahaya bersih
ui.sd.threads_per_cpu_core_for_parallel_: Utas per inti CPU untuk pemindaian paralel. Lebih tinggi = lebih banyak throughput I/O. Diperlukan mulai ulang.
ui.sd.tooltip_hover_delay: Milliseconds to wait before showing title tooltips (0 = immediate). Uses a custom layer; native WebKit delay is not configurable.
ui.sd.tray_transport_source: Which list the menubar tray popover's prev/next buttons walk through — independent of the EOF autoplay queue above
ui.sd.watch_scan_directories_for_new_cha: Tonton direktori pemindaian untuk file baru/yang diubah dan indeks secara otomatis
ui.sd.when_on_resolve_pdf_page_counts_in: When on, resolve PDF page counts in the background while the PDF tab is open (including on launch if that tab is restored). When off, use Command Palette → Start PDF metadata for a full pass; the table still shows values already in the database.
ui.sd.wipe_all_scan_results_history_and_: Hapus semua hasil pemindaian, riwayat, dan cache KVR. Mulai sepenuhnya baru
ui.settings.cache_files_empty: Tidak ada file data yang ditemukan
ui.settings.interface_language_desc: Bahasa yang dipilih berlaku untuk UI dan bilah menu setelah Anda memulai ulang aplikasi
ui.shortcut.clear_all_caches: Clear all SQLite and UI caches
ui.shortcut.set_sample_loop_region_end: Set sample loop end at playhead
ui.shortcut.set_sample_loop_region_start: Set sample loop start at playhead
ui.shortcut.toggle_auto_play_sample_on_s: Toggle play sample on keyboard selection
ui.splash.subtitle: Manajer Plugin Audio
ui.splash.title: AUDIO HAXOR
ui.st.reset_all_ui_layout: Setel Ulang Semua Tata Letak UI
ui.tt.add_note_tags_to_current_track_n: Tambahkan catatan/tag ke trek saat ini (N)
ui.tt.add_remove_current_track_from_favo: Menambah/menghapus trek saat ini dari favorit (F)
ui.tt.additional_directories_to_scan_for: Additional directories to scan for audio samples, one path per line. Press Enter between paths; long paths scroll horizontally (no soft wrap).
Additional directories to scan for DAW project files, one path per line. Press Enter between paths; long paths scroll horizontally (no soft wrap).
Additional directories to scan for MIDI files, one path per line. Press Enter between paths; long paths scroll horizontally (no soft wrap).
Additional directories to scan for MIDI files, one path per line
Additional directories to scan for PDF documents, one path per line. Press Enter between paths; long paths scroll horizontally (no soft wrap).
Additional directories to scan for PDF documents, one path per line
Additional directories to scan for plugin presets, one path per line. Press Enter between paths; long paths scroll horizontally (no soft wrap).
Additional directories to scan for video files, one path per line. Press Enter between paths; long paths scroll horizontally (no soft wrap).
Additional directories to scan for VST/AU plugins, one path per line. Press Enter between paths; long paths scroll horizontally (no soft wrap).
ui.tt.app_log_verbosity_select: How much detail is written to app.log
ui.tt.audio_engine_output_device_and_plu: Audio engine — output device and plugin graph (planned)
ui.tt.audio_engine_tab: Audio engine — output device, plugin insert chain, engine status (F6)
ui.tt.audio_scanner_directories_being_wa: Pemindai audio — direktori sedang dijalankan untuk sampel audio. Klik kanan untuk menyalin jalur.
ui.tt.auto_content_dup_on_startup: Run byte-duplicate scan automatically after startup library load
ui.tt.auto_fingerprint_cache_on_startup: Build fingerprint cache automatically after startup library load
ui.tt.auto_kvr_check_on_startup: Run KVR plugin update check once when the app finishes startup load
ui.tt.auto_pdf_metadata_on_startup: Start PDF metadata extraction automatically once after app launch
ui.tt.auto_pdf_scan_on_startup: Scan for PDFs automatically on launch when the indexed PDF count is zero
ui.tt.automatically_analyze_bpm_key_lufs: Analisis BPM/Key/LUFS pada startup secara otomatis
ui.tt.automatically_check_kvr_for_update: Secara otomatis memeriksa pembaruan KVR setelah pemindaian
ui.tt.automatically_scan_on_app_launch: Pindai secara otomatis saat peluncuran aplikasi
ui.tt.autoplay_next_source: Which list end-of-track autoplay cycles through (sequential, loops)
ui.tt.background_pdf_metadata_extraction: Background PDF metadata extraction when this setting is on
ui.tt.batch_size_for_streaming_scan_resu: Ukuran batch untuk streaming hasil pemindaian ke UI
ui.tt.channel_buffer_size_for_scan_resul: Ukuran buffer saluran untuk hasil pemindaian
ui.tt.check_kvr_audio_for_newer_versions: Periksa KVR Audio untuk versi yang lebih baru
ui.tt.clear_all_data_and_return_to_initi: Hapus semua data dan kembali ke keadaan awal
ui.tt.clear_all_databases: Hapus semua tabel riwayat pemindaian (plugin, audio, DAW, preset, MIDI, PDF)
ui.tt.clear_all_scan_history_tables_plug: Clear all scan history tables (plugins, audio, DAW, presets, MIDI, PDF)
ui.tt.clear_cached_kvr_plugin_version_da: Hapus data versi plugin KVR yang di-cache
ui.tt.clear_tag_filter_and_hide_bar: Hapus filter tag dan sembunyikan bilah
ui.tt.completed_scans_to_keep_per_type_w: Completed scans to keep per type when pruning
ui.tt.content_dup_stop: Stop byte-duplicate scan after the current hash chunk finishes
ui.tt.create_a_new_rule_based_smart_play: Buat playlist cerdas berbasis aturan baru
ui.tt.daw_open_in_project: Klik dua kali untuk membuka di {daw}
ui.tt.daw_scanner_directories_being_walk: Pemindai DAW — direktori yang dijalankan untuk proyek DAW. Klik kanan untuk menyalin jalur.
ui.tt.daw_xref_show_plugins: Tampilkan plugin yang digunakan dalam proyek ini
ui.tt.default_plugin_type_filter_on_laun: Filter jenis plugin default saat peluncuran
ui.tt.default_sort_order_for_midi_files: Default sort order for MIDI files
ui.tt.delete_all_saved_custom_color_pres: Hapus semua preset warna khusus yang disimpan
ui.tt.directory_names_to_exclude_from_sc: Nama direktori yang dikecualikan dari pemindaian, satu nama per baris
ui.tt.drag_band_nodes_to_adjust_frequenc: Seret node pita untuk menyesuaikan frekuensi dan penguatan
Drag band nodes to adjust frequency and gain
ui.tt.enable_automatic_background_bpm_ke: Enable automatic background BPM/Key/LUFS batch analysis
ui.tt.export_selected_rows: Ekspor baris terpilih (dialog sama seperti bilah alat tab: JSON, TOML, CSV, PDF)
ui.tt.export_selected_rows_same_dialog_a: Export selected rows (same dialog as the tab toolbar)
ui.tt.export_settings_and_keybindings_to: Ekspor pengaturan dan pengikatan kunci ke file teks
ui.tt.fft_spectrum_analyzer_right_click_: FFT Spectrum Analyzer — klik kanan untuk melihat opsi
ui.tt.fft_spectrum_analyzer_show_only_th: FFT Spectrum Analyzer — tampilkan ini saja
ui.tt.filter_files_in_current_directory: Filter file di direktori saat ini
ui.tt.filter_settings: Filter pengaturan berdasarkan judul, deskripsi, atau bagian (Esc untuk menghapus)
ui.tt.filter_settings_by_title_descripti: Filter settings by title, description, or section (Esc to clear)
ui.tt.folder_watch_directories: Folder watch paths, one per line (overrides combined scan dirs when non-empty)
ui.tt.fuzzy_filter_keyboard_shortcuts_by: Pintasan keyboard filter fuzzy berdasarkan nama atau tombol
ui.tt.go_to_app_data_directory: Go to app data directory (preferences, database, logs)
ui.tt.how_much_detail_is_written_to_app_: How much detail is written to app.log
ui.tt.incremental_directory_scan: Skip unchanged directories in unified scan (preference incrementalDirectoryScan)
ui.tt.low_level_sine_on_f32_default_stre: Low-level sine on F32 default stream; toggle live if supported
ui.tt.maximum_file_descriptors_open_file: Deskriptor file maksimum (file terbuka) untuk proses tersebut
ui.tt.maximum_number_of_cached_waveforms: Jumlah maksimum bentuk gelombang yang di-cache
ui.tt.maximum_number_of_recently_played_: Jumlah maksimum trek yang baru diputar yang perlu diingat
ui.tt.np_fft_rclick_freeze: Right-click for the floating menu: play/pause, loop, and animate or freeze the spectrum (saved).
ui.tt.number_of_items_per_page_in_tables: Jumlah item per halaman dalam tabel
ui.tt.octave_band_analyzer_right_click_f: Penganalisis pita oktaf — klik kanan untuk melihat opsi
ui.tt.open_audio_haxor_github_repository: Buka repositori GitHub AUDIO_HAXOR di browser
ui.tt.open_log_file_in_default_text_edit: Buka file log di editor teks default
ui.tt.open_preferences_file_in_external_: Buka file preferensi di editor eksternal
ui.tt.oscilloscope_right_click_for_optio: Osiloskop — klik kanan untuk melihat opsi
ui.tt.pdf_metadata_background_auto: Background PDF metadata extraction while the PDF tab is active (finishes the current 100-file chunk when turned off)
ui.tt.pdf_row_double_click_open_default: Klik dua kali untuk membuka dengan aplikasi default
ui.tt.pdf_scanner_directories_being_walk: Pemindai PDF — direktori berjalan untuk dokumen PDF. Klik kanan untuk menyalin jalur.
ui.tt.peak_rms_level_meters_right_click_: Pengukur level Puncak / RMS — klik kanan untuk melihat opsi
ui.tt.play_audio_samples_on_single_click: Putar sampel audio dengan satu klik, bukan klik dua kali
ui.tt.plugin_scanner_directories_being_w: Pemindai plugin — direktori yang dijalankan untuk plugin VST/AU. Klik kanan untuk menyalin jalur.
ui.tt.preset_midi_scanner_directories_be: Pemindai preset/MIDI — direktori yang dijalankan untuk preset dan file MIDI. Klik kanan untuk menyalin jalur.
ui.tt.prune_old_scans: Toggle pruning of old completed scan snapshots on startup
ui.tt.prune_old_scans_keep: How many completed scans to keep per type when pruning is enabled
ui.tt.real_time_audio_analyzer_and_visua: Penganalisis dan visualisator audio waktu nyata
ui.tt.remove_current_directory_from_book: Hapus direktori saat ini dari bookmark
ui.tt.reset_all_column_widths_to_default: Reset semua lebar kolom ke default
ui.tt.reset_all_eq_bands_and_effects_to_: Reset semua band dan efek EQ ke default
ui.tt.reset_all_fzf_parameters_to_defaul: Reset semua parameter fzf ke default
ui.tt.reset_all_keyboard_shortcuts_to_de: Reset semua pintasan keyboard ke default
ui.tt.reset_every_ui_layout_preference_t: Reset setiap preferensi tata letak UI ke default pabrik
ui.tt.reset_settings_section_order_to_de: Atur ulang urutan bagian pengaturan ke default
ui.tt.reset_tab_order_to_default: Atur ulang urutan tab ke default
ui.tt.resume_scan_from_where_it_stopped_: Resume scan from where it stopped
ui.tt.reveal_first_selected_in_finder: Buka yang pertama kali dipilih di Finder
ui.tt.row_double_click_reveal_finder: Klik dua kali untuk menampilkannya di Finder
ui.tt.run_bpm_key_lufs_analysis: Memulai atau melanjutkan analisis BPM/Kunci/LUFS latar belakang untuk file yang belum dianalisis
ui.tt.run_content_dup_scan: Start or resume the byte-duplicate SHA-256 scan
ui.tt.save_current_colors_as_a_reusable_: Simpan warna saat ini sebagai preset yang dapat digunakan kembali
ui.tt.save_custom_audio_sample_scan_dire: Simpan direktori pemindaian sampel audio khusus
ui.tt.save_custom_daw_project_scan_direc: Simpan direktori pemindaian proyek DAW khusus
ui.tt.scan_all_ableton_reaper_projects_f: Pindai semua proyek Ableton/REAPER untuk referensi plugin
ui.tt.scan_all_plugins_samples_daw_proje: Pindai semua plugin, sampel, proyek DAW, dan preset
ui.tt.scan_filesystem_for_pdf_documents: Pindai sistem file untuk dokumen PDF
ui.tt.scan_for_midi_files: Pindai sistem file untuk file MIDI
ui.tt.scan_system_directories_for_audio_: Pindai direktori sistem untuk plugin audio
ui.tt.scrolling_spectrogram_right_click_: Spektogram bergulir — klik kanan untuk melihat opsi
ui.tt.search_midi_files_by_name_or_path: Cari file MIDI berdasarkan nama atau jalur
ui.tt.search_pdfs_by_name_or_path: Cari PDF berdasarkan nama atau jalur
ui.tt.search_recently_played_and_sample_: Cari yang baru saja diputar dan contoh perpustakaan
ui.tt.search_videos_by_name_or_path: Search videos by name or path
ui.tt.seconds_per_plug_in_module_before_: Seconds per plug-in module before the scan worker kills the child process (5–3600).
ui.tt.seconds_to_wait_before_resuming_ba: Beberapa detik menunggu sebelum melanjutkan analisis latar belakang
ui.tt.show_audio_player_automatically_on: Tampilkan pemutar audio secara otomatis saat peluncuran aplikasi
ui.tt.show_plugin_dependency_graph_run_p: Tampilkan grafik ketergantungan plugin (jalankan Indeks Plugin terlebih dahulu)
ui.tt.skip_unchanged_directories_in_unif: Skip unchanged directories in unified scan (incrementalDirectoryScan)
ui.tt.snapshot_export_dir: Absolute path to a folder for PNG snapshot exports
ui.tt.snapshot_export_dir_browse: Choose folder for snapshot PNG exports
ui.tt.snapshot_export_dir_clear: Clear custom folder and use app data snapshots/
ui.tt.sp_playlist_item: Click to load; right-click for options
ui.tt.sqlite_read_pool_extra: SQLite read pool — extra connections beyond the primary handle
ui.tt.start_or_resume_background_bpm_key: Start or resume background BPM/Key/LUFS analysis for unanalyzed files
ui.tt.start_playback_when_keyboard_selec: Start playback when keyboard selection moves to a new sample row
Start playback when keyboard selection moves to a new sample row
ui.tt.stereo_field_lissajous_right_click: Bidang stereo / Lissajous — klik kanan untuk melihat opsi
ui.tt.stop_background_bpm_key_lufs_analy: Stop background BPM/Key/LUFS analysis (after the current batch finishes)
ui.tt.stop_bpm_key_lufs_analysis: Hentikan analisis BPM/Kunci/LUFS latar belakang (setelah batch saat ini selesai)
ui.tt.stop_content_dup_scan: Stop the byte-duplicate scan (after the current hash chunk)
ui.tt.stop_pdf_metadata_extraction: Stop background PDF metadata extraction (finishes the current chunk first)
ui.tt.switch_between_dark_and_light_them: Beralih antara tema gelap dan terang
ui.tt.system_output_device_for_the_engin: System output device for the engine
ui.tt.toggle_auto_advance_to_next_track_: Alihkan maju otomatis ke trek berikutnya di akhir pemutaran
ui.tt.toggle_crt_scanline_overlay_effect: Alihkan efek hamparan garis pindaian CRT
ui.tt.toggle_metadata_expansion_on_doubl: Alihkan perluasan metadata dengan klik dua kali
ui.tt.tray_transport_source: Which list tray popover prev/next cycles through (sequential, loops)
ui.tt.unified_file_walker: Pejalan file terpadu — traversal tunggal yang mengklasifikasikan audio, proyek DAW, preset, MIDI, dan PDF. Klik kanan untuk menyalin jalur.
ui.tt.unified_file_walker_single_travers: Unified file walker — single traversal classifying audio, DAW projects, presets, MIDI, and PDFs. Right-click to copy paths.
ui.tt.vst2_vst3_clap_and_au_plugins_cmd_: VST2, VST3, CLAP, and AU plugins (Cmd+1)
ui.tt.watch_directories_for_filesystem_c: Perhatikan direktori untuk perubahan sistem file
ui.tt.which_list_eof_autoplay_cycles_thr: Which list EOF autoplay cycles through
ui.tt.which_list_tray_popover_prev_next_: Which list tray popover prev/next cycles through
ui.xref.no_plugins_in_project: No plugins found in this project
ui.xref.reverse_empty_tip: Tip: Click the ⚡ plugin count badges on DAW project rows to scan them first.
ui.xref.tree_too_large_plain: File too large for tree view ({mb} MB). Showing first 500KB as text.
ui.xref.tree_too_large_use_export: File too large for tree view ({mb} MB). Showing first 500KB. Use Export to save full XML.
